subject: bin1 refinement
body:
Dear all,

I was wondering if anyone has done a refinement at bin 1 (apix=1.66A) with 
box size of 256? 

I have a lot of problems with extraction and some tilt-series just dont 
work (even though they work fine at bin2 or pixel size of 2.5A!!!). After 
breaking into individual tilt-series and going to relion I cannot refine bc 
I run out of GPU memory.  I have access to GPUs  with 48G of memory and 
only using 1 thread per GPU. 

Am I doing something wrong? or do I just need even bigger GPUs?

Best,
Hamid
